title: Windows should create wall-segment measurements like doors/closets/openings
description: When a wall with a window is selected, the measurement spans should show the distance from wall edge to window, the window width, and the distance from window to other wall edge — same behavior as doors, closets, and openings.

title: Furniture near windows is difficult to select — window hit area too large
description: When furniture is placed against a window, clicking almost anywhere selects the window instead. The feature hit-test runs before the furniture hit-test and has a generous tolerance. Need to prioritize furniture selection over window features when both overlap.

title: Add locking for walls and wall features (doors/windows/closets/openings)
description: Allow users to lock walls and wall feature placements to prevent accidental edits. Furniture already supports locking. Walls and features need a `locked` property and UI controls.

title: Sidebar measurement inputs should only update on blur
description: Number inputs in the control sidebar currently trigger canvas redraws on every keystroke. When manually editing a wall dimension, deleting the current value to type a new one causes crazy shapes. Inputs should commit changes on blur instead of on every change event.
